dict.string: Conterm uses Apple Events to support shell integration.
Conterm is a terminal: your shell and the tools it runs (git, kubectl, helm, claude) read files here on your behalf.
Conterm is a terminal: your shell and the tools it runs (git, kubectl, helm, claude) read files here on your behalf.
Conterm is a terminal: your shell and the tools it runs (git, kubectl, helm, claude) read files here on your behalf.
Conterm is a terminal: your shell and the tools it runs (git, kubectl, helm, claude) read files here on your behalf.
Conterm is a terminal: your shell and the tools it runs (git, kubectl, helm, claude) read files here on your behalf.
